## What changed

## Safety boundary

- [ ] Uses synthetic data only
- [ ] Keeps consequential actions owner-only
- [ ] Adds no credentials, secrets, raw documents, or personal data

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] Desktop and mobile visual inspection
